title: croton ihosianus
intro: Croton ihosianus, also known as the 'Kokum' plant, is a tropical tree native to the Western Ghats in India, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton ihosianus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, manage blood sugar levels, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are crushed to extract the oil, which is used in various forms, including topical creams, ointments, and capsules, and is also used as a natural dye.
